description_long: This object is a vintage-style television with a rounded, rectangular body and a prominent convex glass screen. The front features a grayscale display showing a classic film scene, flanked by a thick, light gray bezel and two round control knobs below the screen. The casing is primarily a muted orange-red color, with the front and side edges in a contrasting light gray. The back panel is perforated with ventilation holes and includes a small power switch, while a pair of thin, metallic V-shaped antennas extend from the top. The television stands on four small black feet, giving it stability and a slight elevation from the surface. Its overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century consumer electronics, with a robust plastic and metal construction.
description: A retro, orange and gray television with a convex glass screen, metal antennas, and classic control knobs. The design features a rounded body, vented back, and vintage styling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the convex glass screen displaying a black-and-white film, two round control knobs, and the thick light gray bezel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curved orange casing, the transition to the gray front, and the protruding antenna mount on top.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the orange back panel with ventilation holes, a small power switch, and the base of the antennas.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the smooth orange surface, side vent, and the gray front edge.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, light gray plastic bezel with rounded corners and a smooth finish
attribute_control_button_layout: two round knobs and a button below the screen on the front panel
